ItacPersonItem.Notes: At the end of the volume in praise of Elena Cornaro, he signs `Patritius romanus Eques S. Stephani`. In Bibliotheca romana, vol.II (1692), p. 343, he declares to be member of Concordi (Ravenna), Ansiosi (Gubbio?), Scompositi (Fano?). For details see M. Ceresa, `Mandosio, Prospero`, in DBI.
ItacPersonItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
